title.description: Vito ra pulatifomo leri kombisiwaka eka xihloko. Pulatifomo yo kuma swiresipe swa swakudya swa misava hinkwayo.

subtitle.description: Xivutiso lexi kombisiwaka ehansi ka vito ra pulatifomo eka xihloko.

heroTitle.description: Xihloko lexikulu eka xiphemu xa hero xa peji ra le ka ndzhawu ya le ka khaya.

heroSubtitle.text: Hlaya swiresipe swa ntiyiso swa xikolo xa swakudya swa misava hinkwayo
heroSubtitle.description: Xivutiso lexi kombisiwaka ehansi ka xihloko xa hero eka peji ra le ka ndzhawu ya le ka khaya.

featuredTitle.description: Xihloko xa xiphemu lexi kombisiwaka eka xisungulo xa grid ya makhadi ya swiresipe.

cookingTime.description: Xiphemu xa nkarhi wa ku pheka eka khadi ra swiresipe. {minutes} yi hundzuluxiwa hi nhumeri ya timinete.

difficulty.description: Xiphemu lexi kombisiwaka eka xiphemu xa matimba eka khadi ra swiresipe.

easy.description: Xiphemu xa matimba lexi kombisiwaka eka swiresipe leswinga olovaka.

medium.description: Xiphemu xa matimba lexi kombisiwaka eka swiresipe leswinga olovaka swinene.

hard.description: Xiphemu xa matimba lexi kombisiwaka eka swiresipe leswinene swinene.

ramenName.description: Vito ra swiresipe swa Tonkotsu Ramen.

ramenDescription.text: Nyama ya nkhuku ya xihoko leyinene leyinene ni chashu leyinyenyana, nhova leyi tsakisaka, ni noodles leyin'wana.
ramenDescription.description: Nhlamuselo ya swiresipe swa Tonkotsu Ramen.

margheritaName.description: Vito ra swiresipe swa Pizza ya Margherita.

margheritaDescription.text: Pizza ya Neapolitan ya xivumbeko xa khale ni tinambhu ta San Marzano, mozzarella leyintshwa, na basil.
margheritaDescription.description: Nhlamuselo ya swiresipe swa Pizza ya Margherita.

tacosName.description: Vito ra swiresipe swa Tacos al Pastor.

tacosDescription.text: Tacos ta nyama ya nkungu leyi koxiwaka ni pineapple, cilantro, na anyisi eka tortillas ya mbewu ya mhungu.
tacosDescription.description: Nhlamuselo ya swiresipe swa Tacos al Pastor.

butterChickenName.description: Vito ra swiresipe swa Butter Chicken.

butterChickenDescription.text: Nyama ya nkhuku leyinyenyana eka swisi swa tamati ni butter swo tiya ni swiphephana swa xivumbeko.
butterChickenDescription.description: Nhlamuselo ya swiresipe swa Butter Chicken.

padThaiName.description: Vito ra swiresipe swa Pad Thai.

padThaiDescription.text: Noodles ya vhusiku byo hlelela hi shrimp, tofu, timpeleti, ni swisi swa tamarind.
padThaiDescription.description: Nhlamuselo ya swiresipe swa Pad Thai.

crepesName.description: Vito ra swiresipe swa French Crepes.

crepesDescription.text: Crepes leyinyenyana, leyi nga riki na moya leyipfukaka leyi tivelaka Nutella, masipala matsongo, ni swikombelo swa swikandza.
crepesDescription.description: Nhlamuselo ya swiresipe swa French Crepes.

label.description: Xiphemu lexi endlaka leswaku ku cinca ririmi eka xihloko.

en.description: Nkombiso wa ririmi ra Xinghezi eka ku cinca ka ririmi.

ja.description: Nkombiso wa ririmi ra Xijapani eka ku cinca ka ririmi.

es.description: Nkombiso wa ririmi ra Xihispaniya eka ku cinca ka ririmi.
